text:
http://www.FreeBSD.org/handbook/eresources.html#ERESOURCES-MAIL

does not list the following mailing lists

freebsd-atm

Fix: 

Copy the descriptions from the mailing list search form to the indicated page.
How-To-Repeat: go to the url
